---
title: "Global Sustainable Energy Trends (2000–2020)"
subtitle: "commit or quit"
author:
  - Shakshi Shah
  - Annamalai Vikash Raam Manoj
  - Siyuan Yin
  - Xuanning Zhang
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    incremental: false
    embed-resources: true
    preview-links: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---
